title: Test Automation Engineer
description: Gusto is building modern payroll and HR software for small and medium businesses. We're hiring a Test Automation Engineer to design and implement automated test frameworks that ensure quality across our platform. You'll work closely with product and engineering teams to identify testable scenarios and build robust test suites that catch regressions before they reach customers.
responsibilities: Design and implement automated test scripts using frameworks like Selenium or Cypress
Develop test strategies to balance automation coverage with testing efficiency
Collaborate with developers to identify critical user paths that need automated coverage
Maintain and refactor test code as product features evolve
Execute manual testing for exploratory and complex scenarios
Participate in sprint planning and help estimate testing effort for new features

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field
skills: Programming in Java, Python, or JavaScript
certifications: None required; ISTQB or equivalent QA certification a plus

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage
Flexible work schedule and unlimited PTO
